datasets.name: ds_job_run_timeline
queryLines:
SELECT 
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  t1.job_id, 
  t1.run_id, 
  t1.period_start_time, 
  t1.period_end_time, 
  t1.result_state
FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline t1
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE t1.result_state IS NOT NULL
  AND t1.period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS

datasets.name: ds_job_run_cost_agg
queryLines:
WITH jobs_usage_with_list_cost AS (
  SELECT t1.*,
         t1.usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default * 0.73 AS list_cost
  FROM system.billing.usage t1
  INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices list_prices
    ON t1.cloud = list_prices.cloud
   AND t1.sku_name = list_prices.sku_name
   AND t1.usage_start_time >= list_prices.price_start_time
   AND (t1.usage_end_time <= list_prices.price_end_time OR list_prices.price_end_time IS NULL)
  WHERE t1.sku_name LIKE '%JOBS%'
    AND usage_date >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
),
jobs_usage_per_workspace AS (
  SELECT workspace_id, SUM(list_cost) AS list_cost
  FROM jobs_usage_with_list_cost GROUP BY ALL
)
SELECT
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t1.job_id)  AS num_jobs,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t1.run_id)  AS num_runs,
  FIRST(t2.list_cost)        AS list_cost
FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline t1
LEFT JOIN jobs_usage_per_workspace t2 USING (workspace_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY list_cost DESC

datasets.name: ds_highest_failure_jobs
queryLines:
WITH terminal_statuses AS (
  SELECT workspace_id, job_id,
    CASE WHEN result_state IN ('ERROR','FAILED','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_failure,
    period_end_time AS last_seen_date
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline
  WHERE result_state IS NOT NULL
    AND period_end_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
),
most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  FIRST(t2.name)                                                    AS name,
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING))       AS workspace_name,
  t1.job_id,
  COUNT(*)                                                          AS runs,
  SUM(is_failure)                                                   AS failures,
  (1 - COALESCE(TRY_DIVIDE(SUM(is_failure), COUNT(*)), 0)) * 100    AS success_ratio,
  MAX(t1.last_seen_date)                                            AS last_seen_date
FROM terminal_statuses t1
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs t2 USING (workspace_id, job_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY failures DESC

datasets.name: ds_long_running_jobs
queryLines:
WITH job_runs AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    job_id,
    run_id,
    period_start_time,
    period_end_time,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, period_start_time, period_end_time) AS duration_minutes,
    result_state
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline
  WHERE period_end_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
    AND period_end_time IS NOT NULL
    AND period_start_time IS NOT NULL
    AND result_state IS NOT NULL
),
most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  FIRST(j.name) AS name,
  jr.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(jr.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  jr.job_id,
  COUNT(*) AS total_runs,
  ROUND(AVG(jr.duration_minutes), 2) AS avg_duration_minutes,
  MAX(jr.duration_minutes) AS max_duration_minutes,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY jr.duration_minutes), 2) AS p95_duration_minutes,
  MAX(jr.period_end_time) AS last_run_time
FROM job_runs jr
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs j ON jr.workspace_id = j.workspace_id AND jr.job_id = j.job_id
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON jr.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY jr.workspace_id, jr.job_id, workspace_name
HAVING AVG(jr.duration_minutes) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_duration_minutes DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: ds_most_expensive_jobs
queryLines:
WITH list_cost_per_job AS (
  SELECT
    t1.workspace_id,
    t1.usage_metadata.job_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t1.usage_metadata.job_run_id) AS runs,
    SUM(t1.usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default * 0.73) AS list_cost,
    FIRST(identity_metadata.run_as, TRUE) AS run_as,
    MAX(t1.usage_end_time) AS last_seen_date
  FROM system.billing.usage t1
  INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices list_prices
    ON t1.cloud = list_prices.cloud
   AND t1.sku_name = list_prices.sku_name
   AND t1.usage_start_time >= list_prices.price_start_time
   AND (t1.usage_end_time <= list_prices.price_end_time OR list_prices.price_end_time IS NULL)
  WHERE t1.sku_name LIKE '%JOBS%'
    AND t1.usage_metadata.job_id IS NOT NULL
    AND t1.usage_date >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
  GROUP BY ALL
),
most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  t2.name,
  t1.job_id,
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  t1.runs,
  t1.run_as,
  SUM(t1.list_cost) AS list_cost,
  t1.last_seen_date
FROM list_cost_per_job t1
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs t2 USING (workspace_id, job_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY list_cost DESC

datasets.name: ds_billing_30_60_days
queryLines:
WITH jobs_usage_with_list_cost AS (
  SELECT t1.*,
         t1.usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default * 0.73 AS list_cost
  FROM system.billing.usage t1
  INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices list_prices
    ON t1.cloud = list_prices.cloud
   AND t1.sku_name = list_prices.sku_name
   AND t1.usage_start_time >= list_prices.price_start_time
   AND (t1.usage_end_time <= list_prices.price_end_time OR list_prices.price_end_time IS NULL)
  WHERE t1.sku_name LIKE '%JOBS%'
)
SELECT
  sku_name,
  SUM(list_cost) AS spend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -30) AND CURRENT_DATE()                 THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END) AS Last30DaySpend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -60) AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -31) THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END) AS Last30to60DaySpend,
  TRY_DIVIDE(
    SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -30) AND CURRENT_DATE()                 THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -60) AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -31) THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END),
    SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -60) AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -31) THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END)
  ) * 100 AS Last30DayGrowth
FROM jobs_usage_with_list_cost
GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_pipeline_updates
queryLines:
WITH most_recent_pipelines AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, pipeline_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.pipelines QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  u.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(u.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  u.pipeline_id,
  p.name                      AS pipeline_name,
  u.update_id,
  u.update_type,
  u.period_start_time,
  u.period_end_time
FROM system.lakeflow.pipeline_update_timeline u
LEFT JOIN most_recent_pipelines p USING (workspace_id, pipeline_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON u.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE u.period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
ORDER BY u.period_start_time DESC

datasets.name: ds_pipeline_failures
queryLines:
WITH most_recent_pipelines AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, pipeline_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.pipelines QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  u.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(u.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  u.pipeline_id,
  p.name AS pipeline_name,
  COUNT(*)       AS failed_updates
FROM system.lakeflow.pipeline_update_timeline u
LEFT JOIN most_recent_pipelines p USING (workspace_id, pipeline_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON u.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE u.period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
  AND UPPER(u.update_type) IN ('FAILED','CANCELED')
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY failed_updates DESC

datasets.name: ds_clusters_active
queryLines:
WITH latest_cluster_records AS (
  SELECT
    c.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.cluster_id ORDER BY c.change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.compute.clusters c
  WHERE c.delete_time IS NULL
)
SELECT
  c.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(c.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  c.cluster_id,
  c.cluster_name,
  c.owned_by,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.driver_node_type,
  c.worker_node_type,
  c.worker_count,
  c.min_autoscale_workers,
  c.max_autoscale_workers,
  c.auto_termination_minutes,
  c.create_time,
  c.dbr_version
FROM latest_cluster_records c
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON c.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE c.rn = 1
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

datasets.name: ds_billing_daily_timeseries
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('DAY', usage_start_time)                               AS day,
  billing_origin_product,
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING))       AS workspace_name,
  ROUND(SUM(usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default * 0.73), 2)       AS list_cost
FROM system.billing.usage t1
INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices list_prices
  ON t1.cloud = list_prices.cloud
 AND t1.sku_name = list_prices.sku_name
 AND t1.usage_start_time >= list_prices.price_start_time
 AND (t1.usage_end_time <= list_prices.price_end_time OR list_prices.price_end_time IS NULL)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE t1.usage_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
ORDER BY 1

datasets.name: ds_idle_cluster_waste
queryLines:
WITH latest_cluster_records AS (
  SELECT
    c.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.cluster_id ORDER BY c.change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.compute.clusters c
  WHERE c.delete_time IS NULL
)
SELECT
  c.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(c.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  c.cluster_id,
  c.cluster_name,
  c.owned_by,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.driver_node_type,
  c.worker_node_type,
  c.worker_count,
  c.auto_termination_minutes,
  c.create_time,
  ROUND(DATEDIFF(HOUR, c.create_time, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) / 24.0, 1) AS days_alive,
  CASE
    WHEN c.auto_termination_minutes IS NULL THEN 'NO AUTO-TERMINATION ⚠️'
    WHEN c.auto_termination_minutes > 120 THEN 'EXCESSIVE TIMEOUT (>2h)'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END AS risk_level
FROM latest_cluster_records c
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON c.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE c.rn = 1
  AND c.cluster_source IN ('UI', 'API')
  AND (c.auto_termination_minutes IS NULL OR c.auto_termination_minutes > 120)
ORDER BY days_alive DESC

datasets.name: ds_job_failure_root_cause
queryLines:
WITH most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
),
failed_runs AS (
  SELECT
    t.workspace_id,
    t.job_id,
    t.run_id,
    t.result_state,
    t.period_end_time,
    t.period_start_time
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline t
  WHERE t.result_state IN ('FAILED', 'ERROR', 'TIMED_OUT')
    AND t.period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
)
SELECT
  j.name AS job_name,
  f.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(f.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  f.result_state AS failure_state,
  COUNT(*) AS failure_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT f.run_id) AS affected_runs,
  MAX(f.period_end_time) AS last_failure_time,
  MIN(f.period_start_time) AS first_failure_time
FROM failed_runs f
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs j ON f.workspace_id = j.workspace_id AND f.job_id = j.job_id
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON f.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
HAVING failure_count >= 3
ORDER BY failure_count DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: ds_cluster_startup_analysis
queryLines:
WITH latest_cluster_records AS (
  SELECT
    c.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.cluster_id ORDER BY c.change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.compute.clusters c
  WHERE c.create_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
    AND c.delete_time IS NULL
)
SELECT
  c.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(c.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.driver_node_type,
  c.worker_node_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cluster_count,
  ROUND(DATEDIFF(DAY, MIN(c.create_time), MAX(c.create_time)), 1) AS time_span_days,
  MIN(c.create_time) AS first_cluster_created,
  MAX(c.create_time) AS last_cluster_created,
  CASE
    WHEN c.cluster_source = 'JOB' THEN 'JOB CLUSTER'
    WHEN c.auto_termination_minutes IS NULL THEN 'NO AUTO-TERMINATION'
    WHEN c.auto_termination_minutes > 120 THEN 'LONG TIMEOUT (>2h)'
    ELSE 'WELL CONFIGURED'
  END AS config_status
FROM latest_cluster_records c
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON c.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE c.rn = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, c.auto_termination_minutes
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY cluster_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_workspace_admin_changes
queryLines:
SELECT
  event_time,
  workspace_id,
  user_identity.email AS admin_who_made_change,
  action_name,
  request_params.targetUserName AS user_affected,
  request_params.groupName AS group_name,
  CASE
    WHEN action_name = 'addPrincipalToGroup' THEN 'GRANTED ACCESS ✅'
    WHEN action_name = 'removePrincipalFromGroup' THEN 'REVOKED ACCESS ❌'
    ELSE action_name
  END AS change_type,
  response.status_code,
  CASE
    WHEN response.status_code = 200 THEN 'SUCCESS'
    ELSE 'FAILED'
  END AS status
FROM system.access.audit
WHERE action_name IN ('addPrincipalToGroup', 'removePrincipalFromGroup')
  AND request_params.groupName IN ('admins', 'users', 'account admins')
  AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 200
